_meta.description: Daily close / traded / deliverable quantity per listed insurer. NSE official; Investing.com public backup.
_meta.source_policy: official-first (NSE). Investing.com is login-free backup only, tagged low-confidence.
_meta.notes: Daily close / traded / deliverable quantity per listed insurer. Workbook seed (NSE via S&P Capital IQ) for niva-bupa listing→Jul-2025; Yahoo Finance keeps it current (close + volume). Deliverable quantity is NSE-only — null where only Yahoo covers a day, until an NSE delivery file is staged.
